column1: # Sheet tab color imported from xlsx tints the letter of the sheet
# indicator on the status line (e.g. `[B: Q1 Red]` with a red B).
# sheets, only Q1 Red and Q2 Blue are tinted.
# Known limitation (IronCalc 0.7): the xlsx exporter drops tabColor,
# so a workbook created / edited in L123 will lose the tint on /FS.
# This transcript exercises import + render only; see
# adapter tests for the pinned round-trip expectation.
# Sheet A (Overview) — no tab color; letter renders DarkGray.
# Ctrl-PgDn → sheet B (Q1 Red).  DB BE 29 is a readable mustard.
# Ctrl-PgUp back to Q1 Red restores its tint.
